principles: Local-first: no network calls in codec cycle
Zero LLM in codec: deterministic parse/encode/decode/verify

threats.mitigation: E2 secret scanner (12 patterns), cortex doctor --scan-secrets, pre-commit hooks
Mutation gates: --mode read-only|editor|admin, env CORTEX_MODE, block_unless_admin_policy for critical sigils
SHA256SUMS manifest, cortex verify --signature, signed releases
VIEW coverage validation, reversible:true gate, post-write validation
CLE learning engine: LLM cannot edit brain directly; all mutations through engine with dry_run_first
Local-first, no LLM in codec cycle, no telemetry, audit log local

unmitigated: No formal threat model document in repo (this benchmark documents it)
MCP server (future) will introduce network surface — threat model needed for E5

privacy_policy.data_stored: Local .cortex files, local audit JSONL, local learn-index.json
privacy_policy.data_transmitted: None (local-first, no network calls in codec)
privacy_policy.user_control: Full (local files, user owns all data, can delete anytime)
